name: Sparkline
description: Simplified area chart to show trends
searchText: sparkline simplified area chart to show trends @mantine/charts /charts/sparkline areaprops color connectnulls curvetype data fillopacity strokewidth trendcolors withgradient

props.name: areaProps
props.description: Props passed down to the underlying recharts Area component

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: connectNulls
props.description: Determines whether null values should be connected with other values

props.name: data
props.description: Data used to render the chart

props.name: fillOpacity
props.description: Controls fill opacity of the area

props.name: trendColors
props.description: If set, color prop is ignored and chart color is determined by the difference between first and last value.

props.name: withGradient
props.description: Determines whether the chart fill should be a gradient
